summary: Admin customers page displays correctly in mobile narrow viewport with proper heading, search controls, status filter, and responsive table layout. All required elements are present and accessible at 390px width.

violations.description: Admin interface uses neutral gray palette instead of maintaining visual separation from public marketing surfaces - should preserve distinct admin chrome styling

actions: Verify table horizontal scroll functionality works smoothly on actual mobile devices
Test search and filter interactions at mobile narrow viewport
Confirm quick actions (suspend/impersonate) remain accessible in mobile layout
